message:
fix: clippy lints and worker panic propagation hardening

Fix 4 clippy lints that were blocking CI:
- openai_responses.rs: consume String via move assignment instead of
  clone_from to satisfy needless_pass_by_value (2 sites)
- session.rs: use Ok(()) instead of Ok(_) for ignored_unit_patterns
- session_store_v2.rs: convert match Some/None to let-else for
  single_match_else

Also includes worker panic propagation from concurrent agents:
- auth.rs: extract finish_auth_task helper, apply join-before-recv
  pattern to load_async and save_async
- session.rs: apply finish_worker_result to session picker/index
  worker paths
- session_store_v2.rs: add sync_all() after truncate for durability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
